assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory

assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains: name: nextjs-cdk-deploy, description: "Deploy Next.js applications to AWS using CDK with staged rollouts (staging → production), environment-specific configs, manual approval gates, and rollback procedures."

assertion_results.text: The description mentions Next.js and AWS or CDK and deployment

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive coverage: 'Phase 2: Deploy to Staging' (lines 43-47), 'Phase 4: Deploy to Production' (lines 55-61), environment config section with staging.ts and production.ts examples (lines 70-125), 'Production Config Differences' section (lines 118-125)

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures
assertion_results.evidence: Dedicated '## Rollback Procedures' section (lines 253-327) with 4 strategies: Strategy 1 CDK Rollback (lines 255-269), Strategy 2 CloudFormation Rollback (lines 271-288), Strategy 3 ECS Service Rollback (lines 290-306), Strategy 4 CloudFront Rollback (lines 308-317), plus a decision table (lines 319-327)

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with deployment-related scripts
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 4 deployment-related scripts: deploy.sh, rollback.sh, smoke-test.sh, synth-and-diff.sh
